request_payload.exposure_text: As a mother and a responsible citizen, I've always believed in supporting our alliances for collective security. But have we considered the real costs? Recent reports show that while we bear a disproportionate share of NATO's burden, our own infrastructure and social programs are underfunded. Isn't it time we prioritize our own preparedness? #NationalSecurityFirst #SmartAlliances
